error: Kernel compilation aborted with PermissionError: [Errno 13] Permission denied: '/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/opp/vendors/config.ini'.
code_diff:
--- env_before
+++ env_after
@@
-- Use default ASCEND_OPP_PATH from /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/opp
++ Create a user-readable ASCEND_OPP_PATH override directory in the workspace
++ Add vendors/config.ini with load_priority=customize
++ Symlink built-in, op_impl, scene.info, and vendors/customize from the system opp tree
++ Run verification/build commands with ASCEND_OPP_PATH pointing to the override directory
summary: When AscendC kernel build fails because opc_tool cannot read the toolkit-owned vendors/config.ini, create a user-owned ASCEND_OPP_PATH overlay with a minimal vendors/config.ini and symlinks to the system opp tree, then rerun compilation with ASCEND_OPP_PATH pointing to that overlay.
